subcodes.first_line: O peerless God! We offer unto Thee our supplications and prayers. Make Thou these servants the confidants of Thy mysteries, and from [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یزدان بی انباز نیاز آریم و نماز که این بندگانرا براز خویش دمساز نما و از
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @prayer for nearness to God, @spiritual transformation
